news.paragraph: NVIDIA is investing $3.2 billion in Corning to secure glass fiber for its chips. Ahead of upcoming earnings, Wells Fargo has raised its price target for the stock to $315. This upcoming earnings report represents a major imminent catalyst for the stock.
